options.a: low speeds when wing with the up-going aileron exceeds that wing’s critical Angle Of Attack.
options.b: low speeds when the wing with the down-going aileron twists, increasing that wing’s camber.
options.c: high speeds when the wing with the down-going aileron twists, reducing that wing’s Lift Coefficient.
options.d: high speeds when the wing with the up-going aileron causes sufficient drag, leading to adverse yaw.
